message:
fix: make ActResult.timed_out required, document streaming middleware limitation

- Changed ActResult.timed_out from optional to required boolean
- Added JSDoc note on Client.stream() explaining only request-transforming
  middleware applies to streaming (response-wrapping middleware has no effect)
- Updated all ActResult construction sites with explicit timed_out: false

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 			output: "error output",
 			success: false,
 			stumbles: 1,
+			timed_out: false,
 			turns: 3,
 		},
 		session_id: overrides.session_id ?? "session-1",
